ItacPersonItem.Notes: Printer of Accademia degli Incogniti, see Mario Infelise, "`ex ignoto notus`. Note sul tipografo Sarzina e l`Accademia degli Incogniti`, in Libri, tipografi e biblioteche, ed. A. Ganda and E. Grignani, Florence, Olschki, 1998, pp. 207-223. Clizia Carminati, `Loredan, Giovanfrancesco`, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
